baseline.reason: Correctly identifies CWE-401 memory leak root cause: menuEntry allocated at line 276 before the fgState.ActiveMenus check at line 280, and fgError (calling exit(1)) at line 281 terminates without freeing it. Trigger path is accurate with correct line numbers and data-flow. No unsupported speculation.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies the same CWE-401 vulnerability with matching root cause explanation. Accurately traces the trigger path from allocation (line 276) through condition check (line 280) to fgError/exit(1) sink (line 281/266). No errors or unsupported speculation. Both explanations are essentially equivalent in quality.
